zh.Caldecote, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英國英格蘭爾卡爾德可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph de Wilbraham於大約1340年出生在英國爾拉德諾時，他的父親William de Wilbraham II41歲，母親Cecilia37歲。他於1361年與Agnes Caldecote在英國英格蘭爾卡爾德可特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1388年在英國英格蘭爾拉德諾享年50歲。

zh-hans.Caldecote, Cheshire, England, United Kin: 英国英格兰爾卡爾德可特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph de Wilbraham于大约1340年出生在英国爾拉德諾时，他的父亲William de Wilbraham II41岁，母亲Cecilia37岁。他于1361年与Agnes Caldecote在英国英格兰爾卡爾德可特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于大约1388年在英国英格兰爾拉德諾享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Wilbraham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Great and Little Wilbraham (Cambridgeshire). The placename derives from the Old English female personal name Wilburg + Old English hām ‘village, homestead’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph de Wilbraham was born about 1340, in Radnor, Cheshire, England, his father, William de Wilbraham II, was 41 and his mother, Cecilia, was 37. He married Agnes Caldecote in 1361, in Caldecote, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died about 1388, in Radnor, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph de Wilbraham est né environ 1340, à Radnor, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Wilbraham II, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Cecilia, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Caldecote en 1361, à Caldecote, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé environ 1388, à Radnor, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph de Wilbraham um 1340 in Radnor, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Wilbraham II 41 und seine Mutter Cecilia 37. Er hat 1361 in Caldecote, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Caldecote geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb um 1388 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Radnor, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Wilbraham è nato il circa 1340 nel Radnor, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, William de Wilbraham II, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Cecilia, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Caldecote nel 1361, nel Caldecote, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì circa 1388, nel Radnor, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph de Wilbrahamが約1340年にイギリスチェシュアイアラドノーで生まれた時，父William de Wilbraham IIは41歳，母Ceciliaは37歳であった。1361年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアカルデコトでAgnes Caldecoteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は約1388年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアラドノーで50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph de Wilbraham(이)가 대략 1340년 영국 체실르 라드너에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Wilbraham II(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Cecilia(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1361년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 캘데컷에서 Agnes Caldecote(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1388년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 라드너에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph de Wilbraham nasceu aproximadamente 1340, em Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Wilbraham II, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Cecilia, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Caldecote em 1361, em Caldecote, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1388, em Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph de Wilbraham родился около 1340 г. в местности раднор, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William de Wilbraham II было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Cecilia, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Caldecote в 1361 г. в местности калдекот, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер около 1388 г. в местности раднор, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет.

sm.Abt 1340–Abt 1388: e tusa o le 1340–e tusa o le 1388

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph de Wilbraham nació aproximadamente 1340, en Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William de Wilbraham II, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Cecilia, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Agnes Caldecote en 1361, en Caldecote, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió aproximadamente 1388, en Radnor, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años.
